name: Penne Alla Puttane D'elba
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb young zucchini, sliced paper thin
12 large leaves basil, torn in half
1 lb overripe tomatoes, roughly chopped, retaining seeds
2 tbsp giant capers, rinsed of salt and drained
1 lb dried penne pasta, preferably Italian
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine zucchini, garlic, basil, tomatoes, olive oil, capers, olives, lemon juice, pepper flakes, and salt. Allow to stand in cool place for 1/2 hour.
2. Meanwhile, bring 6 quarts water to boil in spaghetti pot and add 2 tablespoons salt. Drop penne in and cook according to package instructions until al dente, about 10 to 12 minutes. Drain pasta in colander and add pasta to the vegetables in the mixing bowl. Stir gently to mix well and serve immediately.
3. This dish is not served hot!
